name: Shark Marsellaise
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into an oven-proof dish and place over medium flame.
2. Add onion, chopped parsley, minced garlic, diced tomatoes, salt, and pepper to the dish.
3. Place shark fillets on top of the vegetables.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Lower the flame and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Add white wine and bring back to a boil.
7. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Transfer the dish to the preheated oven and bake for 10 minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
9. Remove the fish from the oven.
10. Strain the sauce through a sieve and heat it to boiling.
11. Pour the sauce over the fillets.
